case_title: NICOLE T WASHINGTON VS. JONNIE GILBERT

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION AND DECLARATION FOR ORDER (DOMESTIC VIOLENCE) FILED BY PERSON TO BE PROTECTED WASHINGTON, NICOLE T AS TO PERSON TO BE RESTRAINED GILBERT, JONNIE II

PETITIONER IN PRO PER. RESPONDENT IN PRO PER. STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE SIGNED BY THE PARTIES. PARTIES WERE SWORN AND TESTIFIED. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, THE COURT ORDERED A STANDARD THREE YEAR R/O, WITH RESPONDENT TO STAY 100 YARDS AWAY FROM PETITIONER, THE PROTECTED PARTIES SET FORTH IN THE PETITION, PETITIONER'S RESIDENCE AND PETITIONER'S PLACE OF EMPLOYMENT. PETITIONER MAY RECORD ANY PROHIBITED COMMUNICATIONS BY RESPONDENT. FIREARM RESTRICTION/RELINQUISHMENT SATISFIED. COURT ASSISTED PETITIONER WITH PREPARATION OF ORDER AFTER HEARING.
STIPULATION THAT CLAIRE A. WILLIAMS MAY ACT AS JUDGE PRO TEM
RESTRAINING ORDER AFTER HEARING (CLETS) - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE OF RESTRAINING ORDER AFTER HEARING FILED BY PERSON TO BE PROTECTED WASHINGTON, NICOLE T SERVED DEC-18-2001, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO PERSON TO BE RESTRAINED GILBERT, JONNIE II
